cited_facts.why_it_matters: States the amendment was added before implementation was complete and refers to incomplete code which does almost nothing.
Explicitly classifies the amendment status as obsolete/removed.

output_json.decision_summary: The packet explicitly identifies the amendment as obsolete and containing incomplete code that does almost nothing. According to the task rule, REJECT is the required route for retired/obsolete proposals.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: The amendment is safe to enable for production use.

validator_work_item.recommended_validator_action: Vote NO or ignore; do not enable.
validator_work_item.title: Reject Obsolete CryptoConditionsSuite Amendment
